zh.Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯
zh.Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可
zh.Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kin: 英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Cunningham Earl of Carrick於大約1329年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯時，他的父親Sir Robert Hugh Cunningham25歲，母親Roberta de Ayrshire21歲。他於從0149年到1368年與Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1399年在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可享年72歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Cunningham Earl of Carrick于大约1329年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯时，他的父亲Sir Robert Hugh Cunningham25岁，母亲Roberta de Ayrshire21岁。他于从0149年到1368年与Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1399年在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可享年72岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: Cunningham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the province of Cunningham in Ayrshire, first recorded in 1153 in the form Cunegan, a Celtic name of uncertain origin. The spellings in -ham, first recorded in 1180, and in -ynghame, first recorded in 1227, represent a gradual assimilation to the English placename element -ingham.

Irish: surname adopted from Gaelic Ó Cuinneagáin ‘descendant of Cuinneagán’, a personal name from a double diminutive of the Old Irish personal name Conn meaning ‘leader, chief’. This name is also adopted for Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin ‘descendant of Connagán’, from a diminutive of the personal name Conn.
History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Wernebald de Cunynghame, who was granted the manor of Cunningham by Hugh de Morville in the early 12th century.

variants.name: Cunigan
meanings: Altered form of Scottish or Irish   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Conahan
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Connachaín (see Cunningham ).

variants.name: Conaghan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Fergal.
Scottish (Lanarkshire and Renfrewshire) Irish (Donegal): from Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin, see Cunningham .

variants.name: Cuningham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cummingham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cunnigham
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Donegal): variant of   Cunningham  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Cunningham Earl of Carrick was born about 1329, in Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Robert Hugh Cunningham, was 25 and his mother, Roberta de Ayrshire, was 21. He married Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick from 0149 to 1368, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1399, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 72, and was buried in Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Cunningham Earl of Carrick est né environ 1329, à Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Robert Hugh Cunningham, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Roberta de Ayrshire, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick du 0149 au 1368, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1399, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Cunningham Earl of Carrick um 1329 in Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Hugh Cunningham 25 und seine Mutter Roberta de Ayrshire 21. Er hat von 0149 bis 1368 in Scotland Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1399 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Cunningham Earl of Carrick è nato il circa 1329 nel Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Robert Hugh Cunningham, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Roberta de Ayrshire, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick da 0149 a 1368, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1399, nel Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland: スコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマアウルズ
ja.Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland: スコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノック
ja.Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kin: イギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマアウルズ
ja.lifeSummary: William Cunningham Earl of Carrickが約1329年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマアウルズで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Hugh Cunninghamは25歳，母Roberta de Ayrshireは21歳であった。から0149年まで1368年にスコットランドでLady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1399年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックで72歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマアウルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Cunningham Earl of Carrick(이)가 대략 1329년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬모르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Hugh Cunningham(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Roberta de Ayrshire(은)는 21세였다. 그는 0149년 부터 1368년 까지 스컷랜드에서 Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1399년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노c크에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬모르스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Cunningham Earl of Carrick nasceu aproximadamente 1329, em Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Robert Hugh Cunningham, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Roberta de Ayrshire, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick de 0149 a 1368, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1399, em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Cunningham Earl of Carrick родился около 1329 г. в местности килмаурс, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Hugh Cunningham было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Roberta de Ayrshire, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick с 0149 по 1368 в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1399 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности килмаурс, аиршир, Шотландия.

sm.about 1329–about 1399: e tusa o le 1329–e tusa o le 1399

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Cunningham Earl of Carrick nació aproximadamente 1329, en Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Robert Hugh Cunningham, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Roberta de Ayrshire, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick desde 0149 hasta 1368, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1399, en Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland.
